category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line program to download videos from www.nicovideo.jp.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nicovideo-dl; source_facts.homepage is the nicovideo-dl OSDN project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official OSDN project page and is the best official documentation surface found for this legacy tool.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to OSDN, but no current official source-control project URL could be verified from official accessible sources.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI downloader for www.nicovideo.jp.
